𝗧𝗢𝗞𝗘𝗡-𝗗𝗔𝗦𝗛𝗕𝗢𝗔𝗥𝗗 | To provide users with local, detailed analytics and cost insights into their Claude Code AI interactions, enabling them to identify and optimize expensive prompts and wasteful usage patterns.  ✨ Notable!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with local, detailed analytics and cost insights into their Claude Code AI interactions, enabling them to identify and optimize expensive prompts and wasteful usage patterns.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local data processing: No data leaves the user's machine.
✅ Per-prompt cost analytics.
✅ Tool/file heatmaps.
✅ Subagent attribution.
✅ Cache analytics.
✅ Project comparisons.
✅ Rule-based tips engine.
✅ Real-time updates.


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 320 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 65 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Token Dashboard is a local application that analyzes JSONL transcripts generated by Claude Code. It provides insights into token usage, costs, and patterns, helping users understand and optimize their AI interactions without sending any data off their machine.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/nateherkai/token-dashboard

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗡𝗣𝗫𝗦𝗞𝗜𝗟𝗟𝗨𝗜 | To reverse-engineer existing design systems from any source (web, local, repo) and make them readily usable by AI code generation tools like Claude for rapid UI development.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To reverse-engineer existing design systems from any source (web, local, repo) and make them readily usable by AI code generation tools like Claude for rapid UI development.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Extracts design systems (colors, typography, spacing, components, animations, screenshots) from URLs, local directories, or Git repositories.
✅ Supports default static analysis and an 'ultra mode' using Playwright for visual and interaction details.
✅ Generates `CLAUDE.md`, `SKILL.md`, and `DESIGN.md` files for AI integration.
✅ Packages extracted design system into a `.skill` ZIP file.
✅ Requires Node.js 18+ and optionally Playwright for ultra mode.


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 433 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 46 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

SkillUI is a command-line interface tool that analyzes websites, local codebases, or Git repositories to extract their complete design systems. It packages this information into a format that AI models like Claude can directly use to generate UI code, enabling rapid UI development based on existing design languages.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/amaancoderx/npxskillui

𝗞𝗜𝗧𝗧𝗬𝗙𝗔𝗥𝗠 | Running and managing multiple iOS Simulators and Android Emulators concurrently on a Mac for efficient mobile app testing and development.  🔥 Super Hot!

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🍎 Swift 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Running and managing multiple iOS Simulators and Android Emulators concurrently on a Mac for efficient mobile app testing and development.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Live display of iOS Simulators and Android Emulators in a single window
✅ Synchronized touch input across multiple devices
✅ Device bezels rendered from official assets
✅ Build & Play functionality for parallel deployment
✅ Drag-and-drop device reordering
✅ Proportional layout scaling


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 164 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 12 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

KittyFarm is a macOS application designed to streamline mobile development workflows by allowing developers to run and control multiple iOS Simulators and Android Emulators simultaneously within a single window. It offers features like synchronized touch input, parallel deployment, and proportional device scaling.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/dnakov/kittyfarm

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗔𝗟𝗟𝗨𝗥𝗘-𝗡𝗢𝗧𝗜𝗙𝗜𝗖𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 | Automating the distribution of test execution reports to communication platforms.  📈 Growing!

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: ☕ Java 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Automating the distribution of test execution reports to communication platforms.
📅 Created: Nov 2019 • Updated: Apr 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automatic test result notifications
✅ Support for multiple messengers (Telegram, Slack, Mattermost, Discord, etc.)
✅ Generates a pie chart visualization of test statistics
✅ Includes a link to the Allure report/build
✅ Configurable via JSON file
✅ Can be run locally or from Jenkins


♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 567 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 95 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 21 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Allure Notifications is a Java library that automatically sends test execution results to various messengers. It generates a pie chart from the test statistics and includes a link to the build report.

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/qa-guru/allure-notifications

𝗠𝗢𝗦𝗦 | Enabling developers to integrate a secure, decentralized P2P mesh networking capability into applications written in various languages through a C-shared library interface.  🔍 Worth a Look

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling developers to integrate a secure, decentralized P2P mesh networking capability into applications written in various languages through a C-shared library interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Embeddable P2P mesh core
✅ Exported as C-shared library via CGO
✅ Tracker-based bootstrapping (BEP 15 UDP, BEP 3 HTTP)
✅ Encrypted peer transport (Noise XX)
✅ Topic-based pub/sub routing (GRAFT/PRUNE)
✅ NAT profiling and relay primitives
✅ FFI surface for C, C++, Python, Rust
✅ Unit, integration, and smoke tests


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 5 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Moss is an embeddable P2P mesh networking core written in Go, exported as a C-shared library for cross-language integration. It provides secure, topic-based pub/sub messaging with tracker-based bootstrapping and NAT traversal capabilities.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/redstone-md/moss
